text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if galvanized to action by Silence Suzuka's
otherworldly speed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Younger runners have also been pulling far ahead
in this new age of speed-first racing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! Here I cooooome!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yesss! Mom! Mama! I hope you were watching!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, the roommate of Silence Suzuka, is
one of them and dominated the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Twinkle Series heating up, the stage is
set for the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So you're running today too, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's been a while. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you? What... have I done?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Back at the Derby, you ran in a way only you
could. Watching you, I...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I realized that I also have to run according to my
own heart.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The Suzuka who raced against you then was not
me. But today... I am my real self.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And I finally get to run with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I understand, Suzuka. I'm excited as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready for what you bring to the track. And on
my part...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'll usher in a new wind, one unlike anything the
Mejiros or anyone else has seen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This Takarazuka Kinen is shaping up to be a
meaningful race, more than just a warm-up match
before the upcoming autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, don't fool yourself into thinking I'll let
you do whatever you want this race. You will not
be having your way today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I swear upon my title as Empress. I, Air Groove,
will put you in your place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I won't let Bright carry all this responsibility
herself. She'll have it too easy if no one
challenges her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She's not the only one running for the Mejiros,
and I'll prove that today! If luck is on my side!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You've made it here, Dober. I look forward to
seeing if you have what it takes to be queen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Your jaw will hit the floor when you see me run.
That I can swear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The energy around the course is tense. It's the
kind of tension only felt before races of historic
consequence, like today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fierce competition between these four rivals
will echo throughout Hanshin once they hit the
turf.
